en: Hello friends, welcome back to my channel. Today you will get to know about an amazing fact that
I am sure you did not know before. Till now, a Sanskrit word had the prestige of holding the
Guinness Book of World Records for the longest word, having around 195 characters. It has the
distinction of being the longest word in all of literature. But now a new word has been found
that is the longest English word and consists of 189,819 letters. It's the chemical name for
the largest known protein, titin. The full name for the protein nicknamed titin would take three
and a half hours to say out loud. While this is, by far, the longest word in English, till now,
the longest word in the Oxford English Dictionary has 45 letters,
and the longest made-up word has just 28 letters.
Thanks for watching, please like, share and subscribe for more amazing facts.
